title: Xtra Spicy Polish Mushroom Dumplings
description: A spicy and adventurous Polish dish featuring dry sherry and macrobiotic-friendly ingredients, these pillowy dumplings are sure to delight, with a tempering of flavors to balance the heat.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, salt, and black pepper.
Gradually add dry sherry to the flour mixture, stirring with a fork until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into small pieces and roll each into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of sliced mushrooms and chopped onion in the center of each circle.
Add a sprinkle of minced garlic and a dash of hot sauce on top of the mushrooms.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a half-moon shape and press the edges together to seal.
Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat and fry the dumplings until they are golden brown.
Serve the dumplings hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
